headlines.title: Venezuela earthquakes live: At least 188 dead as rescue efforts intensify
headlines.snippet: Venezuelans are battling to rescue loved ones trapped under rubble following two major earthquakes in the country. The intense rescue efforts are underway after the devastating tremors.

headlines.snippet: Rescue teams in Venezuela are urgently searching for survivors and recovering bodies after twin earthquakes struck the nation. The operation is ongoing.

headlines.snippet: Economic losses are mounting in Venezuela as the death toll from recent earthquakes continues to rise. Initial forecasts suggest the damage could significantly impact the nation's GDP.

headlines.snippet: An evacuation initiative in the Strait of Hormuz has been paused after a vessel was attacked. Iran has warned ships to use only Tehran-approved routes.

headlines.snippet: The region of La Guaira in Venezuela has been left in near total devastation following two powerful earthquakes. It was the area hardest hit by the tremors.

headlines.title: US official says frozen Iranian funds have not been released
headlines.snippet: A U.S. official stated that frozen Iranian funds have not been released and will not be until Iran meets the terms of an interim agreement. Any unfrozen funds would primarily be used for U.S. foodstuffs and medicines.

headlines.title: US Supreme Court allows Trump to end protections for Haitian and Syrian migrants
headlines.snippet: The U.S. Supreme Court has permitted the Trump administration to end legal protections for migrants from Haiti and Syria. This decision allows the Department of Homeland Security to move forward with ending temporary protected status for these groups.

headlines.title: IMO suspends Hormuz evacuation plan after vessel hit near Oman
headlines.snippet: The International Maritime Organisation has suspended its plan to evacuate vessels stranded in the Strait of Hormuz. This decision comes after a vessel was struck near Oman's coast.

headlines.snippet: Primary election wins in New York are being framed as a pro-Palestine movement victory, though some believe the movement is being co-opted by mainstream liberalism. Several candidates supported by Mamdani celebrated their wins.

headlines.snippet: A UN agency has paused its evacuation plan for ships in the Strait of Hormuz following an attack on a vessel. The initiative was halted after a ship was struck near Oman.
